_critic_notes: Minibrute2S: was Tension — WRONG. Bowed string model cannot riff. Changed to Analog (sawtooth, HP filter, drive = functionally correct).
Rev2-B: was Meld across Build+Climax — brainstorm has NO Rev2 in Build. Meld in Build adds unauthorized mass and dulls the cut-to-silence before Drop. Constrained to Climax only.
DFAM/Collision: needs explicit distortion chain (Saturator or Amp, pushed) in Breakdown slot to go clinical→destroyed.
Subharmonicon frantic acceleration: Operator cannot self-generate this. Must come from Digitakt pattern change.
Take5/Drift: test transient snap for stabs before committing — Drift may not land hard enough at Energy 9/10.

_rationale.Digitakt: Hardware present — I-beam sample + kick/snare grid
_rationale.DFAM: Collision: physical resonator, clinical Intro→distorted Breakdown (needs processing chain)
_rationale.Subharmonicon: Operator: FM feedback drone, A+Bb half-step crunch, breathes. Frantic acceleration = Digitakt pattern change.
_rationale.Rev2-A: Wavetable: 8-voice unison saw, Climax only — massive detuned pad
_rationale.Rev2-B: Meld (Fold FM): Climax only — contrasts Wavetable's static mass, gives two layers that move
_rationale.Take5: Drift: per-voice detuning, chord stabs in Drop — test attack transient
_rationale.Minibrute2S: Analog: sawtooth, HP filter, drive — correct spectral analog of Minibrute brief. Can riff.
_rationale.Pigments: Pigments VST3 — granular scraping-metal texture bed, Breakdown
